title: Risk Management & Security Policy
overview: Module 5 zooms out from technical execution to organizational risk. You'll learn how security decisions are framed in business terms, how policies and frameworks govern security programs, and deliver a final risk assessment that ties your semester together.

weeks_breakdown.labDesc: NIST RMF, risk registers, likelihood/impact matrices. Qualitative vs quantitative.
Policy writing, NIST CSF, ISO 27001 overview, compliance mapping.
Capstone engagement. Full risk assessment + remediation roadmap.

clientContext.label: Client Context: Brazos Financial Group
clientContext.body: You're back at Brazos for the capstone. Ray Jimenez now has your recon findings from Module 1. He needs a complete risk assessment that quantifies the threats you identified, prioritizes remediation, and gives the board a security investment roadmap.

footer: Start with Lab 5.1 in the Assignments section.
